description: Marco Silva, an engineer at Wind Power LLC, has returned from a business trip to Chicago and submitted out-of-pocket expenses. Your job is to process his reimbursement: Create and submit an Expense Claim for Marco Silva containing four line items (Accommodation: $555.00, Airfare: $420.00, Ground Transportation: $95.00, Meals and Entertainment: $180.00) totaling $1,250.00. Then, create and submit a Payment Entry to reimburse Marco for the full amount. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
